use_cases: Showcasing product features through an interactive scroll-driven narrative experience
Creating engaging landing page sections with sticky content panels
Displaying sequential feature highlights with synchronized imagery
Building storytelling sections that reveal content as users scroll through
Presenting multi-step onboarding or product tours with visual emphasis
ai_summary: A scroll-driven interactive feature showcase component that uses sticky positioning to display content while images scroll in the background. Features 4 slides highlighting AI-powered development tools with bold yellow backgrounds and black text, creating an engaging storytelling experience. Content transitions smoothly as users scroll through each section, making it ideal for product landing pages and feature demonstrations.
